G({},{[I(-734275+739797)]=B;[I(682260+-677538)]=U;[I(523400-518303)]=function()return-52882+-3648413 end})end end,function(U,I)local o=Y(I)local w=function(w,G,h)return p(U,{w;G,h},I,o)end return w end return(r(-690761+16867627,{}))(o(R))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(-11170+16726)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
